boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.
integration_boundaries: Recipes are command sequences for local static files.
Recipes do not describe private tools, CI workflows, upload destinations, live market feeds, or investment actions.

recipes.goal: Evaluate a static event CSV from a clean checkout.
inputs: static event CSV with base event columns
recipes.name: Local CSV Evaluation

recipes.goal: Decide whether optional public fixture columns should be adopted.
recipes.name: Schema Adapter Review

recipes.goal: Share deterministic local evidence with a public evaluator.
guardrails: Use hashes instead of private storage links
inputs: demo artifacts and local source files
recipes.name: Public Artifact Review

recipes.goal: Regenerate release owner surfaces before cutting a static public package.
recipes.name: Maintainer Release Check

title: Public Integration Cookbook
